mapper.select:
SELECT card_product_id, name, type, is_available, issuer_id, annual_fee, pre_month_money, online_only, card_image_url, request_pc_url, request_mobile_url, annual_fee_detail, corp_pr_container, corp_pr_detail, corp_tips, created_time, last_modified_time, persona_id FROM card_product WHERE -- 1순위: 정확 매칭 name = #{inputCardName}
-- 2순위: 접미사 제거 매칭 (_교통, _비교통, _일반 등 제거) OR name = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{inputCardName}, '_[^_]*$', ''))
-- 3순위: 괄호 제거 매칭 OR TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(name, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{inputCardName}, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))
-- 4순위: 접미사 + 괄호 제거 매칭 OR TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(name, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{inputCardName}, '_[^_]*$', ''), '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))
-- 5순위: 대소문자 무시 정확 매칭 OR UPPER(name) = UPPER(#{inputCardName})
-- 6순위: 대소문자 무시 + 접미사 제거 매칭 OR UPPER(name) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{inputCardName}, '_[^_]*$', '')))
-- 7순위: 대소문자 무시 + 괄호 제거 매칭 OR UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(name, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{inputCardName}, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')))
-- 8순위: 대소문자 무시 + 접미사 + 괄호 제거 매칭 OR UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(name, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{inputCardName}, '_[^_]*$', ''), '\\([^)]*\\)', '')))
-- 9순위: 포함 관계 매칭 (접미사 제거 후) OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{inputCardName}, '_[^_]*$', '')), '%')
-- 10순위: 포함 관계 매칭 (접미사 + 괄호 제거 후) OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{inputCardName}, '_[^_]*$', ''), '\\([^)]*\\)', '')), '%')
ORDER BY CASE -- 정확 매칭 최우선 WHEN name = #{inputCardName} THEN 1
-- 접미사 제거 매칭 WHEN name = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{inputCardName}, '_[^_]*$', '')) THEN 2
-- 괄호 제거 매칭 WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(name, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{inputCardName}, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) THEN 3
-- 접미사 + 괄호 제거 매칭 WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(name, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{inputCardName}, '_[^_]*$', ''), '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) THEN 4
-- 대소문자 무시 정확 매칭 WHEN UPPER(name) = UPPER(#{inputCardName}) THEN 5
-- 대소문자 무시 + 접미사 제거 WHEN UPPER(name) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{inputCardName}, '_[^_]*$', ''))) THEN 6
-- 대소문자 무시 + 괄호 제거 WHEN UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(name, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{inputCardName}, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) THEN 7
-- 대소문자 무시 + 접미사 + 괄호 제거 WHEN UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(name, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{inputCardName}, '_[^_]*$', ''), '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) THEN 8
-- 포함 관계 매칭들 WHEN name LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{inputCardName}, '_[^_]*$', '')), '%') THEN 9 WHEN name LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{inputCardName}, '_[^_]*$', ''), '\\([^)]*\\)', '')), '%') THEN 10
ELSE 11 END LIMIT 1

SELECT holding_id as holdingId, card_id as cardId, fin_id as finId, discontinued, card_name as cardName, res_card_no as resCardNo, res_sleep_yn as resSleepYn, res_card_type as resCardType, res_traffic_yn as resTrafficYn, res_image_link as resImageLink, res_issue_date as resIssueDate, res_valid_period as resValidPeriod, res_state as resState, created_time as createdTime, last_modified_time as lastModifiedTime, user_id as userId, connected_id as connectedId FROM mydata_card_holdings WHERE card_id IS NULL AND user_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_time DESC

SELECT holding_id as holdingId, card_id as cardId, fin_id as finId, discontinued, card_name as cardName, res_card_no as resCardNo, res_sleep_yn as resSleepYn, res_card_type as resCardType, res_traffic_yn as resTrafficYn, res_image_link as resImageLink, res_issue_date as resIssueDate, res_valid_period as resValidPeriod, res_state as resState, created_time as createdTime, last_modified_time as lastModifiedTime, user_id as userId, connected_id as connectedId FROM mydata_card_holdings WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE mydata_card_holdings SET card_id = #{cardId}, last_modified_time = NOW() WHERE holding_id = #{holdingId}

UPDATE mydata_card_holdings SET card_id = ( SELECT c.card_product_id FROM card_product c WHERE -- 1순위: 정확 매칭 c.name = mydata_card_holdings.card_name
-- 2순위: 접미사 제거 매칭 OR c.name = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_[^_]*$', ''))
-- 3순위: 괄호 제거 매칭 OR TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))
-- 4순위: 접미사 + 괄호 제거 매칭 OR TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_[^_]*$', ''), '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))
-- 5순위: 대소문자 무시 정확 매칭 OR UPPER(c.name) = UPPER(mydata_card_holdings.card_name)
-- 6순위: 대소문자 무시 + 접미사 제거 매칭 OR UPPER(c.name) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_[^_]*$', '')))
-- 7순위: 대소문자 무시 + 괄호 제거 매칭 OR UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')))
-- 8순위: 대소문자 무시 + 접미사 + 괄호 제거 매칭 OR UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_[^_]*$', ''), '\\([^)]*\\)', '')))
-- 9순위: 포함 관계 매칭 (접미사 제거 후) OR c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_[^_]*$', '')), '%')
ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.name = mydata_card_holdings.card_name THEN 1 WHEN c.name = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_[^_]*$', '')) THEN 2 WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) THEN 3 WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_[^_]*$', ''), '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) THEN 4 WHEN UPPER(c.name) = UPPER(mydata_card_holdings.card_name) THEN 5 WHEN UPPER(c.name) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_[^_]*$', ''))) THEN 6 WHEN UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) THEN 7 WHEN UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_[^_]*$', ''), '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) THEN 8 ELSE 9 END LIMIT 1 ), last_modified_time = NOW() WHERE card_id IS NULL AND user_id IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM card_product c WHERE c.name = mydata_card_holdings.card_name OR c.name = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_[^_]*$', '')) OR TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) OR TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_[^_]*$', ''), '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) OR UPPER(c.name) = UPPER(mydata_card_holdings.card_name) OR UPPER(c.name) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_[^_]*$', ''))) OR UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) OR UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_[^_]*$', ''), '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) OR c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_[^_]*$', '')), '%') )

UPDATE mydata_card_holdings SET card_id = ( SELECT c.card_product_id FROM card_product c WHERE -- 1순위: 정확 매칭 c.name = mydata_card_holdings.card_name -- 2순위: 괄호 제거 후 매칭 OR TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\(.*\\)', '')) = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '\\(.*\\)', '')) -- 3순위: _교통, _비교통 등 접미사 제거 후 매칭 OR c.name = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_교통$|_비교통$|_일반$', '')) OR TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\(.*\\)', '')) = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_교통$|_비교통$|_일반$', ''), '\\(.*\\)', '')) -- 4순위: 대소문자 무시 매칭 OR UPPER(c.name) = UPPER(mydata_card_holdings.card_name) -- 5순위: 대소문자 무시 + 괄호 제거 매칭 OR UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\(.*\\)', ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '\\(.*\\)', ''))) -- 6순위: 대소문자 무시 + 접미사 제거 매칭 OR UPPER(c.name) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_교통$|_비교통$|_일반$', ''))) -- 7순위: 포함 관계 매칭 OR c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_교통$|_비교통$|_일반$', '')), '%') ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.name = mydata_card_holdings.card_name THEN 1 WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\(.*\\)', '')) = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '\\(.*\\)', '')) THEN 2 WHEN c.name = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_교통$|_비교통$|_일반$', '')) THEN 3 WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\(.*\\)', '')) = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_교통$|_비교통$|_일반$', ''), '\\(.*\\)', '')) THEN 4 WHEN UPPER(c.name) = UPPER(mydata_card_holdings.card_name) THEN 5 WHEN UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\(.*\\)', ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '\\(.*\\)', ''))) THEN 6 WHEN UPPER(c.name) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_교통$|_비교통$|_일반$', ''))) THEN 7 ELSE 8 END LIMIT 1 ), last_modified_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND card_id IS NULL AND user_id IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM card_product c WHERE c.name = mydata_card_holdings.card_name OR TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\(.*\\)', '')) = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '\\(.*\\)', '')) OR c.name = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_교통$|_비교통$|_일반$', '')) OR TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\(.*\\)', '')) = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_교통$|_비교통$|_일반$', ''), '\\(.*\\)', '')) OR UPPER(c.name) = UPPER(mydata_card_holdings.card_name) OR UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(c.name, '\\(.*\\)', ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '\\(.*\\)', ''))) OR UPPER(c.name) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_교통$|_비교통$|_일반$', ''))) OR c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(mydata_card_holdings.card_name, '_교통$|_비교통$|_일반$', '')), '%') )
mapper.select:
SELECT card_product_id, name, type, is_available, issuer_id, annual_fee, pre_month_money, online_only, card_image_url, request_pc_url, request_mobile_url, annual_fee_detail, corp_pr_container, corp_pr_detail, corp_tips, created_time, last_modified_time, persona_id FROM card_product WHERE -- 1순위: 정확 매칭 name = #{cardName}
-- 2순위: 접미사 제거 매칭 (_교통, _비교통, _일반 등 제거) OR name = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{cardName}, '_[^_]*$', ''))
-- 3순위: 괄호 제거 매칭 OR TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(name, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{cardName}, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))
-- 4순위: 접미사 + 괄호 제거 매칭 OR TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(name, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{cardName}, '_[^_]*$', ''), '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))
-- 5순위: 대소문자 무시 정확 매칭 OR UPPER(name) = UPPER(#{cardName})
-- 6순위: 대소문자 무시 + 접미사 제거 매칭 OR UPPER(name) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{cardName}, '_[^_]*$', '')))
-- 7순위: 대소문자 무시 + 괄호 제거 매칭 OR UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(name, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{cardName}, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')))
-- 8순위: 대소문자 무시 + 접미사 + 괄호 제거 매칭 OR UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(name, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{cardName}, '_[^_]*$', ''), '\\([^)]*\\)', '')))
-- 9순위: 포함 관계 매칭 (접미사 제거 후) OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{cardName}, '_[^_]*$', '')), '%')
ORDER BY CASE -- 정확 매칭 최우선 WHEN name = #{cardName} THEN 1
-- 접미사 제거 매칭 WHEN name = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{cardName}, '_[^_]*$', '')) THEN 2
-- 괄호 제거 매칭 WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(name, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{cardName}, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) THEN 3
-- 접미사 + 괄호 제거 매칭 WHEN TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(name, '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) = TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{cardName}, '_[^_]*$', ''), '\\([^)]*\\)', '')) THEN 4
-- 대소문자 무시 정확 매칭 WHEN UPPER(name) = UPPER(#{cardName}) THEN 5
-- 대소문자 무시 + 접미사 제거 WHEN UPPER(name) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{cardName}, '_[^_]*$', ''))) THEN 6
-- 대소문자 무시 + 괄호 제거 WHEN UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(name, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{cardName}, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) THEN 7
-- 대소문자 무시 + 접미사 + 괄호 제거 WHEN UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(name, '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) = UPPER(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{cardName}, '_[^_]*$', ''), '\\([^)]*\\)', ''))) THEN 8
-- 포함 관계 매칭들 WHEN name LIKE CONCAT('%', TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(#{cardName}, '_[^_]*$', '')), '%') THEN 9
ELSE 10 END LIMIT 1
